title: Established Pool Service Route – Flower Mound with 46 Accounts
description:
Turn-key pool service business with a loyal, long-standing customer base and immediate cash flow from day one. This well-established route services 46 residential pools, predominantly located in the desirable Flower Mound area, with a handful of accounts in surrounding communities, all efficiently managed along a tight, optimized route.

The backbone of this business is its reliability and retention. The majority of clients have been on service for many years, reflecting the trust and quality that's been built into every visit. This isn't a business you have to build, it's one you simply take over and grow.

What's Included:
* 46 established accounts generating $9,600/month in recurring cleaning revenue
*Additional service income on top of base route revenue (repairs, equipment, chemicals, etc.)
*Option to retain the existing pool technician, ensuring seamless continuity for both customers and new ownership
*A route vehicle is also available for separate purchase if the buyer is interested
*Comprehensive training — 2 weeks hands-on in the field, plus 2 additional weeks of support as needed

Whether you're an experienced pool professional looking to expand, or a motivated first-time buyer entering a recession-resistant, year-round industry, this route offers the stability of proven income with real upside potential through upselling services and natural growth.

The Dallas-Fort Worth market and Flower Mound in particular continues to grow rapidly, meaning new pool owners and new customers are entering the market every season.

Don't miss this rare opportunity to own a cash-flowing, community-rooted route with a foundation already built for you.

Ad#:2484522
